            simpa using hyM
          obtain ⟨ex, hexM, hexV⟩ := hex
          obtain ⟨ey, heyM, heyV⟩ := hey
          have hexey : ex = ey := by
            apply Eq.symm
            apply hM.subsingleton_inc x
            · exact hexM
            · exact heyM
            · intro hne
              have hdisj := hM.disjoint hexM heyM hne
              have hxyV : x ∈ V(G, ex) ∧ y ∈ V(G, ey) := ⟨hexV, heyV⟩
              have hxyV' : x ∈ V(G, ex) ∧ y ∈ V(G, ex) := by
                rw [← hexey] at heyV
                exact ⟨hexV, heyV⟩
              have hloop : ex ∈ E(G, x) ∧ ex ∈ E(G, y) := by
                simpa using hxyV'
              have hloop' : G.IsLoop ex := by
                apply G.isLoop_of_mem_incident x y hxy hloop.1 hloop.2
              exact G.loopless hloop'
          rw [hexey] at heyV
          have hxyV : x ∈ V(G, ex) ∧ y ∈ V(G, ex) := ⟨hexV, heyV⟩
          have hloop : ex ∈ E(G, x) ∧ ex ∈ E(G, y) := by
            simpa using hxyV
          have hloop' : G.IsLoop ex := by
            apply G.isLoop_of_mem_incident x y hxy hloop.1 hloop.2
          exact G.loopless hloop'
        have hcase : M.encard < ν(G) ∨ (M.encard = ν(G) ∧ (x ∉ V(G, M) ∨ y ∉ V(G, M))) := by
          by_cases hMmax : G.IsMaxMatching M
          · right
            constructor
            · rw [hMmax.encard]
            · exact hnotboth
          · left
            rw [← hM.encard_le]
            exact lt_of_not_ge hMmax.max
        cases' hcase with hcase hcase
        · calc
            S.encard ≤ 2 * M.encard := by linarith
            _ ≤ 2 * (ν(G) - 1) := by gcongr
            _ = 2 * ν(G) - 2 := by ring
            _ ≤ 2 * ν(G) - 1 := by linarith
        · obtain ⟨hMenc, hxyM⟩ := hcase
          rw [hMenc]
          have hxyM' : x ∉ V(G, M) ∨ y ∉ V(G, M) := hxyM
          cases' hxyM' with hxM hyM
          · calc
              S.encard ≤ 2 * ν(G) := by linarith
              _ = 2 * ν(G) - 1 + 1 := by ring
              _ ≤ 2 * ν(G) - 1 := by
                have hSx : S ⊆ V(G) \ {x} := by
                  intro z hz
                  simp only [Set.mem_diff, Set.mem_singleton_iff, not_or]
                  exact ⟨by exacts [G.Matching.subset _ hM z hz, hxM.symm ▸ hz], by intro h; subst h; contradiction⟩
                have hSx' : S.encard ≤ rEx := by
                  rw [G.matchingMatroid.eRk_def]
                  refine le_sSup ?_
                  use S
                  constructor
                  · use M
                    exact ⟨hM, by simp [hSx]⟩
                  · rfl
                rw [hrEx] at hSx'
                linarith
          · calc
              S.encard ≤ 2 * ν(G) := by linarith
              _ = 2 * ν(G) - 1 + 1 := by ring
              _ ≤ 2 * ν(G) - 1 := by
                have hSy : S ⊆ V(G) \ {y} := by
                  intro z hz
                  simp only [Set.mem_diff, Set.mem_singleton_iff, not_or]
                  exact ⟨by exacts [G.Matching.subset _ hM z hz, hyM.symm ▸ hz], by intro h; subst h; contradiction⟩
                have hSy' : S.encard ≤ rEy := by
                  rw [G.matchingMatroid.eRk_def]
                  refine le_sSup ?_
                  use S
                  constructor
                  · use M
                    exact ⟨hM, by simp [hSy]⟩
                  · rfl
                rw [hrEy] at hSy'
                linarith
      have h2 : rExy ≥ 2 * ν(G) - 1 := by
        have hMxV : V(G, Mx) ⊆ V(G) \ {x} := hVx
        have hMyV : V(G, My) ⊆ V(G) \ {y} := hVy
        have hMxV' : V(G, Mx) \ {y} ⊆ V(G) \ {x, y} := by
          intro z hz
          simp only [Set.mem_diff, Set.mem_singleton_iff, not_or] at hz ⊢
          exact ⟨by exacts [G.Matching.subset _ hMx.toIsMatching z hz.1, hxMx.symm ▸ hz.1], by intro h; subst h; contradiction, hz.2⟩
        have hMyV' : V(G, My) \ {x} ⊆ V(G) \ {x, y} := by
          intro z hz
          simp only [Set.mem_diff, Set.mem_singleton_iff, not_or] at hz ⊢
          exact ⟨by exacts [G.Matching.subset _ hMy.toIsMatching z hz.1, hyMy.symm ▸ hz.1], hz.2, by intro h; subst h; contradiction⟩
        have hcase : y ∈ V(G, Mx) ∨ y ∉ V(G, Mx) := by
          by_cases h : y ∈ V(G, Mx)
          · left
            exact h
          · right
            exact h
        cases' hcase with hyMx hyMx
        · have hMxV'' : (V(G, Mx) \ {y}).encard = 2 * ν(G) - 1 := by
            have hfin : (V(G, Mx)).Finite := by
              apply Finite.encard_ne_top
              intro h
              have h' : Mx.encard = ⊤ := by
                rw [← hMx.toIsMatching.encard_eq_V_encard_div_two]
                simp [h]
              exact Nat.ne_top_of_lt (lt_of_le_of_lt (zero_le _) h')
            rw [encard_diff_singleton hfin hyMx]
            rw [hMx.toIsMatching.encard_eq_V_encard_div_two hfin]
            rw [hMx'']
            simp
          rw [G.matchingMatroid.eRk_def]
          refine le_sSup ?_
          use V(G, Mx) \ {y}
          constructor
          · use Mx
            exact ⟨hMx.toIsMatching, by simp [hMxV']⟩
          · simp [hMxV'']
        · have hcase' : x ∈ V(G, My) ∨ x ∉ V(G, My) := by
            by_cases h : x ∈ V(G, My)
            · left
              exact h
            · right
              exact h
          cases' hcase' with hxMy hxMy
          · have hMyV'' : (V(G, My) \ {x}).encard = 2 * ν(G) - 1 := by
              have hfin : (V(G, My)).Finite := by
                apply Finite.encard_ne_top
                intro h
                have h' : My.encard = ⊤ := by
                  rw [← hMy.toIsMatching.encard_eq_V_encard_div_two]
                  simp [h]
                exact Nat.ne_top_of_lt (lt_of_le_of_lt (zero_le _) h')
              rw [encard_diff_singleton hfin hxMy]
              rw [hMy.toIsMatching.encard_eq_V_encard_div_two hfin]
              rw [hMy'']
              simp
            rw [G.matchingMatroid.eRk_def]
            refine le_sSup ?_
            use V(G, My) \ {x}
            constructor
            · use My
              exact ⟨hMy.toIsMatching, by simp [hMyV']⟩
            · simp [hMyV'']
          · have hMxV''' : V(G, Mx) ⊆ V(G) \ {x, y} := by
              intro z hz
              simp only [Set.mem_diff, Set.mem_singleton_iff, not_or]
              exact ⟨by exacts [G.Matching.subset _ hMx.toIsMatching z hz, hxMx.symm ▸ hz], by intro h; subst h; contradiction, hyMx.symm ▸ hz⟩
            have hMxV'''' : (V(G, Mx)).encard = 2 * ν(G) := by
              have hfin : (V(G, Mx)).Finite := by
                apply Finite.encard_ne_top
                intro h
                have h' : Mx.encard = ⊤ := by
                  rw [← hMx.toIsMatching.encard_eq_V_encard_div_two]
                  simp [h]
                exact Nat.ne_top_of_lt (lt_of_le_of_lt (zero_le _) h')
              rw [hMx.toIsMatching.encard_eq_V_encard_div_two hfin]
              rw [hMx'']
              simp
            rw [G.matchingMatroid.eRk_def]
            refine le_sSup ?_
            use V(G, Mx)
            constructor
            · use Mx
              exact ⟨hMx.toIsMatching, by simp [hMxV''']⟩
            · simp [hMxV'''']
      linarith
    have hrank : G.matchingMatroid.eRk (V(G) \ {x, y}) = G.matchingMatroid.eRank - 1 := by
      rw [hrExy, rE, hrEx]
      simp
    exact hrank
